title: 有馬記念の後に・Sweet Memories

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Ohhhhh!
Fine Motion!

text_block_list.name: Spectators A and B
text_block_list.text: Fiiiiine Motiooon! Sniffle... Yeeeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Everyone...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, I lost.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: To be honest, I'm really, really, really frustrated! ...But I'm also a little happy.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Because I finally got to race against the real Fine!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Scarlet... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...
Th-there's no need to thank me...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Congratulations on your win! I have to go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, everyone... I've finally reached it—this
wonderful view.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
How do you feel? You better not say anything
but "incredible."

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! After an ending like this, I have no
regrets.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Thought so. Makes sense that you'd be in high
spirits since you won and all...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...I knew from the start how this would play out. I
knew I'd lose here and that would be the end of
the road for me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But where's the fun in that? So I kept searching
for something—anything that could change that
result.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And that's when I found you, Fine. You were
different. At first, all I cared about was getting
some unique data and analyzing it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But then, one day... you defied my predictions. In
that moment, a thought crossed my mind.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: If anyone can change their fate, it's her.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I thought if I could get you to keep running—to
defy your destiny—then that would prove that my
fate could change as well.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: So I put my faith in a dumb hypothesis and clung to it... like an idiot.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And I ended up with the exact lame conclusion
my data predicted. What a joke, right? Go ahead
and laugh.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm not laughing. I know you still haven't given up,
Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Even now, you're replaying today's race in your
head, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You still want to win. You're a noble individual
who can't allow yourself to remain beaten.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: There's no way you're finished. That's why—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And aren't you the same?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You still want to win, don't you? To run?! And
despite that, you're just gonna run home?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Don't turn tail! Don't resign yourself to stepping
down!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Prove it to me! Prove that any circumstances
can be overcome!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Shakur. However, I'm afraid I have to
leave all that to you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You've collected an abundance of data from me,
right? That means I'll keep running within you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Keep running for me, Shakur. Win... and prove
your theory.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm not doing anything for you. I already told
you—everything is for my own sake.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Of course. ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Damn, you really know how to piss me off...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What did you think of the fervor here, princess?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It was incredible!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...That so?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur... Farewell.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, we have a press conference to
announce Fine Motion's return to Ireland.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm all right.
...Hey, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm very fortunate, aren't I? I'm a truly, truly
blessed individual.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I got to run so much, and I made so many friends.
I heard the glorious sound of countless cheers.
choice_data_list:
No one's going to forget the impact you've
made.

No one's going to forget the impact you've
made.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Right. I'm sure they'll all remember me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: And I believe it'll be a dazzling memory.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Fine!
Don't quit! Keep racing!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all so much. However, I must bring
these wonderful three years to a close.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This exquisite ending has been decided from the
very start.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Every race has a beginning and an end. But in our
memories, it becomes more than a simple
contest...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
As long as you none of you forget me, I'll live on
in your memories.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: So please, allow me to stay... within your hearts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's eyes glisten in rare fashion as she
smiles on at the crowd.
